t_ch: 返航之后，是不是忘了些重要的事帕？
t_en: Since coming back, is there anything important that you've forgotten about?

t_ch: 请列车长明示！
t_en: Please elaborate!

t_ch: 哎，就知道你们忘了这事……
t_en: *sigh* I knew you'd forgotten about it...

t_ch: 不能忘记的事是？
t_en: What was it again?

t_ch: …丹恒乘客、三月七乘客他们没跟你说过吗？
t_en: ...Didn't Dan Heng and March 7th tell you about it yet?

t_ch: 之前和丹恒乘客他们说过的呀，仙舟「罗浮」上有不少有好吃好喝的东西呢！你们答应过我要带一些回来——
t_en: I told Dan Heng and them before that the Xianzhou Luofu has so many delicious snacks! You all promised to bring me back something...

t_ch: 这种事情都不记得了吗？没想到{NICKNAME}是这样子的人……
t_en: Don't you remember? I never thought you'd be like that, {NICKNAME}...

t_ch: 别哭，我现在就给你买！
t_en: Don't cry! I'll go buy some for you now.

t_ch: 我买还不行吗？
t_en: Can't I buy some for you?

t_ch: 之前拜托三月七乘客带了几份美食给我，有什么「烤鸟翅」，还有「糖球炒视肉」，感觉口感都有点奇怪。
t_en: I asked March 7th to bring me a few snacks, like "roasted wings" and "sugarball-fried viscorpi," they both have a weird texture.

t_ch: 帕姆觉得这次还是喝点饮料算了，对了，{NICKNAME}你有什么推荐的吗？最好是有「罗浮」风味的那种，这样才算不虚此行嘛！
t_en: I thought it would be nice to have something to drink this time. Oh yeah, {NICKNAME} — can you recommend anything? Hopefully it's something Luofu-style to make our trip worthwhile!

t_ch: 苏打豆汁儿吧，够地道。
t_en: Is mung bean soda authentic enough for you?

t_ch: 我听三月七乘客提起过，是挺有「罗浮」特色的。
t_en: I've heard March 7th mention that before. It's a Luofu special.

t_ch: 喝茶吧，烈焰浓茶很劲道。
t_en: How about a cup of tea? Flaming Potent Tea is pretty strong.

t_ch: 唔，听起来还蛮适合我这种成熟疲惫的列车长帕。
t_en: Ooh, sounds like just the thing for a mature and exhausted conductor like me.

t_ch: 热浮羊奶吧，有助于长高。
t_en: Steamed puffergoat milk, it'll help you grow taller.

t_ch: …不许拿帕姆的身高开玩笑！
t_en: ...There's no need to make jokes about my height, I'll have you know!

t_ch: 仙人快乐茶，绝对够快乐。
t_en: Immortal's Delight will make you happy.

t_ch: 名字很有意思帕，是喝完就能成仙人的意思吗？
t_en: What an interesting name. If I drink it, can I become immortal, too?

t_ch: 那就拜托{NICKNAME}乘客啦，快去快回吧！
t_en: If you could please help me out with that then, {NICKNAME}. Make a quick trip!

t_ch: 你要的饮料。
t_en: Here's your drink.

t_ch: 啊，这么快，辛苦{NICKNAME}乘客了。快让帕姆尝尝！
t_en: Wow, that was fast, {NICKNAME}. Let me have a sip!

t_ch: 这真的是能喝的东西吗？噗噗噗！不行不行我要去漱口！
t_en: Is this really something they drink? Ptooey! No no no, I have to gargle now!

t_ch: 口感挺不错，虽然有点点火辣。
t_en: Nice texture, but just a teeny bit spicy.

t_ch: 呜…好奇怪…有点想唱歌是怎么回事？
t_en: Ooh, strange... Why do I suddenly feel like singing?

t_ch: 甜甜的，热乎乎的，哇这玩意儿喝完浑身都好舒畅是怎么回事？
t_en: It's sweet, and it's piping hot, wow! Why does my whole body feel so loosey goosey right now?

t_ch: 帕姆对这个什么奶特别满意！
t_en: I really like this puffy-whatsit milk!

t_ch: 呜，好好喝…可是…可是帕姆看到它的配料表上……
t_en: Ooh, delicious... but... I just saw its ingredients and...

t_ch: 怎么会有这么多糖啊！帕姆一不小心就全部喝完了，好想再来一瓶啊，但是这热量…呜呜！
t_en: How can they put so much sugar in it! I just casually slammed the whole thing and really want another, but think of the calories... A-boohoo!

t_ch: 盯着我看干嘛，有事吗？
t_en: What are you staring at? What's up?

t_ch: {NICKNAME}乘客，我看你们都收拾东西回列车上了，仙舟的事务想必也解决得差不多了吧。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, I noticed that you've all packed your things up and moved them back on the Express. Those affairs on the Xianzhou must be all good and sorted now, hmm?

t_ch: 那个……
t_en: Then...

t_ch: 帕姆左顾右盼地四处张望，确认没人看向自己这边后，这才松了口气，使劲压低着自己的声线。
t_en: Pom-Pom glanced around and, once sure nobody was looking in that direction, let out a sigh of relief. They lowered their voice.

t_ch: 三月七乘客回来以后，有好几次看到我就捂着嘴偷笑，还说什么「星芋啵啵和帕姆很配嘛」之类的怪话…就连瓦尔特乘客也对着我笑。
t_en: Several times since March got back, she covered her mouth and laughed when she saw me, saying something about "startaro bubble tea suits you"... Even Welt was smirking at me.

t_ch: 还有丹恒，丹恒乘客回来之后感觉有点点奇怪…所以说…你们几个在仙舟上到底发生了什么帕？快跟列车长汇报一下帕！
t_en: And also, things have felt a bit weird with Dan Heng since he got back... so I was wondering... what actually happened over on the Xianzhou? Give your conductor a quick update!

t_ch: （略微透露丹恒的小秘密）
t_en: (You ever-so-slightly let on a tiny bit about Dan Heng's secret)

t_ch: 呼呼——
t_en: *snore* *snore*...

t_ch: 呜哇呜哇，刚刚怎么就睡过去了——{NICKNAME}乘客，你刚刚在说什么来着？
t_en: Wow, ahem sorry, I just dozed off there — {NICKNAME}, you were saying?

t_ch: 你的演技真的好浮夸…
t_en: Your acting is over the top...

t_ch: 咳咳咳，帕姆刚刚是真的睡着了！才不是演的！
t_en: Ahem, I really did just doze off then! I wasn't acting!

t_ch: 那我再说一遍吧！
t_en: Then allow me to repeat!

t_ch: 打住打住！
t_en: Hang on!

t_ch: 你注意到帕姆挺直了身板，突然严肃了起来。
t_en: You notice Pom-Pom suddenly grow stern as their posture straightens.

t_ch: 这些事…等丹恒乘客想说的时候，他自然会说的。帕姆见过不少有故事的乘客…过去的事就让它们过去吧。
t_en: All that... Let Dan Heng tell Pom-Pom himself when he's ready. I've met many a passenger with stories to tell... Let bygones be bygones.

t_ch: 只要{NICKNAME}乘客乖乖的，那就还是帕姆最喜欢的{NICKNAME}乘客！帕你我今天所说的话，就让它烂在帕姆的肚子帕。
t_en: As long as {NICKNAME} is well-behaved, then {NICKNAME} is still my favorite passenger! Pom-Pom shall carry the secret to the end of time.

t_ch: 帕姆将视线转向远方，似乎不愿再与你交谈下去。
t_en: Pom-Pom gazes off into the distance, as if they don't want to talk to you.

t_ch: （解释神探三月七的推理过程）
t_en: (You explain "genius detective" March 7th's process of deduction)

t_ch: 呜哇！原来你们是这么看待帕姆的？！列车长怎么会是干这种事的人帕！
t_en: Wow! So that's what you think of Pom-Pom!? Would a conductor behave this way?

t_ch: 我们这不是尊敬您老人家帕。
t_en: Isn't this actually done out of respect for your seniority?

t_ch: 你好好说话，不要学帕姆说帕！
t_en: Speak properly, and don't imitate Pom-Pom!

t_ch: 列车长就是我们的头儿！
t_en: You are our leader, conductor!

t_ch: 那必须是！
t_en: That's right!

t_ch: 这种奇怪的想法…难怪三月七乘客会偷偷笑，好啦，现在列车长知道你们在仙舟干的「坏事」了。
t_en: What a strange thought... No wonder March 7th was laughing like that. Alright, now I know about all that "bad stuff" you got up to on the Xianzhou.

t_ch: 以后可不许当面喊我这个！我会生气的帕！
t_en: You can't call me that to my face! I'll get angry next time!

t_ch: （讲述你在仙舟作战的英勇事迹）
t_en: (You describe your heroic deeds aboard the Xianzhou)

t_ch: 你详尽地向帕姆讲述了你在仙舟上的英勇事迹——走到哪儿，球棒就挥舞到哪儿。无论对方是魔阴身孽物，又或是可怕的绝灭大君，再惊险的战斗，都成为你话语间的笑谈。
t_en: You tell Pom-Pom in great detail about your heroic deeds aboard the Xianzhou — how swashbuckling you were with the bat. Whether faced with a mara-struck abomination or the dreadful Lord Ravager, even the most thrilling of battles were reduced to a joke in your eyes.

t_ch: 还好是瓦尔特乘客带着你们，要不然帕姆可不放心…这么惊险的战斗，你怎么能当个笑话一样呢？不把自己的性命当回事，这样…这样不好。
t_en: Luckily, Welt went with you, otherwise I'd have been worried... How can the most thrilling of battles be reduced to just a joke? You should take your own life seriously. This... this is not good.

t_ch: 「罗浮」上是不是有位龙女？前些日子她托人送来了一些应急药物，说是答谢列车的诸位。我还觉得奇怪呢…原来是这么回事……
t_en: Did you meet the Dragon Lady aboard the Luofu? She sent someone with emergency medical supplies to the Express, saying that she wanted to express her gratitude toward us. I thought it was strange... So that's how it went...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}乘客，你回来之后就好好休息吧，以后出门在外的，没有帕姆照顾你，你可要多加小心呀。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, now that you're back, please rest up good and proper. Pom-Pom won't be around to look after you when you are away, so take care.

t_ch: 帕姆极为担忧地望着你，湿漉漉的小手戳了戳你的腰，又不放心地检查了你的四肢，发现没有什么大碍后这才松了口气。
t_en: Pom-Pom looks at you with extreme concern, poking you in the back with their clammy hand while nervously checking over your limbs. They let out a sigh of relief upon realizing nothing serious has happened.

t_ch: 你看着帕姆满头大汗的样子，这才意识到，方才那湿漉漉的触感全是帕姆掌心流的汗。
t_en: You look at how sweaty Pom-Pom's face has become and finally realize that the clammy sensation was entirely due to Pom-Pom's sweaty palms.

t_ch: （介绍你遇到的奇人趣事）
t_en: (Tell Pom-Pom about some riveting encounters you experienced)

t_ch: 听起来都是好有趣的事帕。
t_en: It all sounds interesting.

t_ch: 帕姆笑眯眯地看着你，眼神里似乎有某种欣慰。
t_en: Pom-Pom looks at you with a smile, their eyes seeming to betray some form of gladness.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}乘客…这么短时间，你就长大了…啊不对，你的身高倒是没有变动帕。总之就是…变化好大帕。
t_en: {NICKNAME}... you've grown up so quickly... Uh no, your height hasn't actually changed. But all-in-all... you've changed a lot.

t_ch: 在外面都认识这么多朋友了，帕姆想你刚来星穹列车的时候，那会儿还是谁也不认识呢。
t_en: You've met so many friends out there. Pom-Pom thinks back to when you first came aboard the Astral Express, and you didn't know a soul.

t_ch: 至于你提到的那几位朋友，帕姆觉得人都蛮不错的，有空的话你可以喊他们到列车上坐坐。
t_en: As for those friends you mentioned, Pom-Pom thinks they're pretty neat people. If you get the chance, invite them to come aboard the Express.

t_ch: 好了好了，帕姆问完啦，谢谢{NICKNAME}乘客帕！
t_en: Alright, that's all from me. Thanks, {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 列车长的馈赠
t_en: The Conductor's Rewards

t_ch: 让列车长看看…{NICKNAME}乘客，你已经不是帕姆最开始认识的你了！
t_en: Tickets, please! ...Oh {NICKNAME}, you're not the same person Pom-Pom first met! What's happened to you?

t_ch: 是我成长过于飞速。
t_en: I had a really fast growth spurt.

t_ch: 是你对我看法有变。
t_en: The only thing that's changed is your opinion of me.

t_ch: 列车长的眼光是不会出错的。{NICKNAME}乘客，现在的你，已经不再是过去的你了！
t_en: A conductor's eyes never lie. {NICKNAME}, you are not the same person that you were!

t_ch: 三月七乘客最开始在外冒险的时候，也发生了这样的转变。帕姆不知道怎么说比较好…感觉，更加成熟？更加稳重？
t_en: The same thing happened to March 7th when she first went out trailblazing. How can Pom-Pom put this... It feels like you're more mature? More stable?

t_ch: 嗯…就是更加靠谱了帕！这是来自列车长的肯定。
t_en: ...More reliable! Pom-Pom is sure of it.

t_ch: 作为成长的奖励，我给你准备了一些小小的礼物。别客气，尽管收下帕。
t_en: Pom-Pom's got some small rewards for your growth. Skip the formalities, take it all.

t_ch: 之后帕姆也会见证你的进步，并给你准备一些小礼物的哦。至于具体是什么礼物…到时候就知道啦！
t_en: Pom-Pom will keep an eye on your progress and keep preparing some small rewards for you. As for what those will be... You'll find out soon enough!

t_ch: 冒险必备品
t_en: Adventuring Essentials

t_ch: {NICKNAME}乘客，你总算回来了。大家的行李帕姆都收拾好了，唯独你…唔，真是不省心。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, you're back. Everyone's luggage is ready, except for yours... Mm, Pom-Pom just can't get over worrying for you.

t_ch: 列车长有义务保证乘客们的人身安全，我让你回来，就是要保证你的安全——
t_en: Pom-Pom is obliged to ensure the personal safety of all our passengers, so that's why Pom-Pom has called you back — to ensure your safety...

t_ch: 出门在外，得准备好充足的物资帕！这可不是开玩笑的。
t_en: You have to always prepare adequate supplies before you strike out! Pom-Pom is not kidding here.

t_ch: 充足的食物与衣物、应急药物与设备，还有应付恶劣环境的护甲装置…在外冒险的话这些东西都是必不可少的。
t_en: Adequate food, clothing, first-aid kit and medical equipment, protective gear for harsh environments... These are all essential items whenever you're venturing out.

t_ch: 那么，在哪里能买到呢？
t_en: Where can I buy all of that?

t_ch: 在不同星球上能买到当地特产，但我还是推荐你在列车里就提前准备好！列车长可不会乱收费。
t_en: You'll find local specialties on different planets, but by Pom-Pom's recommendation, you should just get everything here on the train! The conductor doesn't rip off passengers.

t_ch: 我初来乍到，不太懂这个…
t_en: I'm new here, and don't really understand how things work...

t_ch: 没关系，就让列车长亲自指点下你帕！
t_en: That's cool, and just let Pom-Pom give you some personal guidance!

t_ch: 看到旁边的「万能合成机」了嘛？集制造、合成、烹饪、维修等多功能于一体…星际和平公司广告上是这么说来着……
t_en: See that Omni-Synthesizer over there? It integrates a load of features into one machine: Manufacturing, synthesizing, cooking, maintenance... At least, that's what the IPC advert claims...

t_ch: 咳咳，总之…只要有足够的材料，通过这玩意，你就能在列车里得到充足的补给。
t_en: Ahem, anyway... As long as you've got the materials, you can get whatever supplies you need right here aboard the train.

t_ch: 至于材料的话，平时在外面你可以多收集一些，有备无患！
t_en: As for those materials, you can find those all over the place. Be prepared, just in case!

t_ch: 眼见为实，你去试试就知道了——对了，你想好现在需要补充什么物资没有？
t_en: Seeing is believing. You'll know it once you try it... Speaking of, have you figured out what supplies you still need?

t_ch: 得想办法囤点吃的！
t_en: Gotta stock up on some food!

t_ch: …{NICKNAME}乘客怎么和三月七乘客一样…不过出门在外，的确得带够食物，以免饿肚子。
t_en: ...{NICKNAME}, you're just like March 7th... But really, please take enough food out with you, otherwise you'll get hungry.

t_ch: 得储备些应急药物！
t_en: Gotta stock up on some meds!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}乘客想得很周到嘛，和丹恒乘客想到一起去了。
t_en: Good idea, {NICKNAME}, exactly what Dan Heng would say.

t_ch: 好啦，列车长给你准备了一份材料，你去用一下合成机试试吧！然后让列车长检验一下你的成果哦！
t_en: Okay, here're some materials for you then. Go try synthesizing something, go on! Pom-Pom shall be the judge of your labor!

t_ch: 冒险必备品
t_en: Adventuring Essentials

t_ch: 怎么样？让列车长看看你的成果帕！
t_en: How'd it go? Let me see how it turned out!

t_ch: 冒险必备品
t_en: Adventuring Essentials

t_ch: 「万能合成机」用起来很方便帕！
t_en: Our Omni-Synthesizer is super convenient, right?

t_ch: 你现在收集到的材料有限，合成机里能制造的东西也有限。但等你以后收集到更多不同的材料了，就能制造出更多东西了。
t_en: Because you only have a few materials right now, you can only synthesize a few things. But as you gather different materials in the future, you'll be able to craft more than that.

t_ch: 所以，以后记得要提前准备好物资再外出哦！
t_en: So always remember to prepare your supplies in advance, before you go out!

t_ch: 毕竟外面的世界…并非每个星球都和列车里一样安全可靠…不不不，没有哪里比列车上更安全帕！
t_en: After all, out there it's... Not every planet can be as safe as we are here on the Express... No, no — I mean, nowhere is safer than we are, here on this train!

t_ch: 果腹粮食
t_en: Comfort Food

t_ch: 简易抢救器
t_en: Simple First-Aid Device

t_ch: 常回家看看
t_en: Don't Forget About Home

t_ch: 发短信好容易错字，帕姆老是容易按错…{NICKNAME}乘客还是多多回来和帕姆面对面说话帕。
t_en: Pom-Pom is so clumsy at messaging people and keeps pressing the wrong thing... Come back regularly and see Pom-Pom face-to-face, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 这次叫{NICKNAME}乘客回来，原因也很简单…咳咳！你，有没有感觉在成长的道路上，心中不免有些迷茫、困顿和烦恼呢？
t_en: Pom-Pom called you back this time for a very simple reason, {NICKNAME}... Ahem! Have you ever been a bit confused or troubled on your journey of growth?

t_ch: 确实有点…
t_en: A little...

t_ch: 这是很正常的！帕姆过去也有这样迷惘的时刻，那时候，我彻夜无眠，仰望星空，探索…诶，好像背错了，后面该怎么说来着…
t_en: Why, that's normal! Pom-Pom remembers feeling similarly bewildered back in the day. I'd stay up all night, gazing up at the stars, exploring... Uh, whoops. How did that sentence go again...

t_ch: 糟糕，完全忘记后面应该讲什么了帕！！
t_en: Drats. Pom-Pom completely blanked on what comes after!

t_ch: 完全没有哦！
t_en: Not at all!

t_ch: 这是很正…诶！？没有吗？唔…没有的话该怎么继续，书上没有写这样的回答情况帕！
t_en: Why, that's norm— huh!? Really? Oh... Where do we go from here, then? The book doesn't cover how to respond to that kind of answer!

t_ch: 总…总之就是！看到{NICKNAME}乘客的进步和成长，我很开心！
t_en: A—Anyway! It's great to see your continued growth, {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 这是给你的奖励，请快点收好帕！
t_en: Here's a reward for you — quick, take it!

t_ch: 以及…帕姆刚才的情况…请你千万别告诉其他乘客！那只是一次失误帕！
t_en: And... about what just happened to Pom-Pom... Please don't tell anyone! It was just a minor slip-up!

t_ch: …那个，{NICKNAME}乘客，帕姆想问你件事哦。
t_en: ...Hey, {NICKNAME}. Pom-Pom's got something to ask you.

t_ch: 咳咳，是跟列车的车厢服务有关的，算…算是个调研吧，你不要多想！
t_en: Ahem, it's related to this Express' carriage service. It's uh, a survey. Don't think too much about it!

t_ch: 有话直说。
t_en: Go ahead.

t_ch: 我保证不会多想！
t_en: I promise not to think too much!

t_ch: 你觉得车厢打扫得算干净吗？我最近总觉得好像有点不对劲……
t_en: Do you think the carriage is very clean? Pom-Pom's been feeling lately like something isn't quite right...

t_ch: 无论我怎么扫，在某个角落里总会有奇怪的绒毛钻出来。这是为什么呢？
t_en: No matter how much Pom-Pom sweeps, there's always this weird fluff coming out of one corner. What's that about?

t_ch: {NICKNAME}乘客，麻烦你去车厢里转转，看看是不是我想多了帕！
t_en: {NICKNAME}, could you please take a look around the carriage and see if Pom-Pom's going crazy or not!

t_ch: 沙发的褶皱处夹着几缕柔软的毛发，从颜色上看——倒是和帕姆的色泽一致。
t_en: There're a few tufts of soft hair tucked into the corners of the couch. Its color — is a dead match for Pom-Pom's.

t_ch: 怎么样，有什么结果了嘛？
t_en: How about it? What'd you find?

t_ch: 在沙发上发现了绒毛…
t_en: I found some tufts of hair on the couch...

t_ch: 果然不是我多心！不过，列车上没有养小动物，这节车厢也没有铺绒毛地毯，怎么会有这种东西帕……
t_en: So Pom-Pom's not going crazy! There're no small animals on the Express however, and this carriage isn't covered in woolen carpet. How could this be, then...

t_ch: 你不就是「小动物」…
t_en: Aren't you in fact a "small animal"...?

t_ch: 呜哇！帕姆是帕姆，帕姆是列车长，才不是什么「小动物」！
t_en: Whoa there! I'm Pom-Pom, and Pom-Pom is the conductor — not some "small animal"!

t_ch: 从色泽来看，应该是你掉的。
t_en: Judging by the color, they belong to you.

t_ch: 颜色、颜色只是巧合帕！
t_en: Color — color is just a coincidence!

t_ch: 奇怪，车上也没有养小动物。
t_en: Strange, there're no small animals aboard the Express.

t_ch: …唔…可、可能…不对，的确没有帕。
t_en: ...Well... B—But... No, there aren't any.

t_ch: 怎么可能会是我的！最近又没有换季，而且我作息很健康，才不会发生这种事！
t_en: How could it be me! There hasn't been any change of season recently, and Pom-Pom's been keeping a healthy schedule so that this doesn't happen!

t_ch: 不过…哎，算了，帕姆会勤加打扫的。{NICKNAME}乘客，这件事你就当没发生过帕……
t_en: But... well, forget it. Pom-Pom's going to be doing a lot more cleaning. {NICKNAME}, please pretend this never happened...

t_ch: 呜…呜呜……
t_en: *sob*... *sniffle*...

t_ch: 列车长…你是在哭吗？
t_en: Conductor... are you crying?

t_ch: …一定是你看错了帕，列车长才不会哭鼻子呢。
t_en: ...You must be mistaken. Pom-Pom would never cry.

t_ch: 谁欺负你了，乖，不哭啊。
t_en: Who bullied you? Be good. Don't cry...

t_ch: 呜…没有，只是…等等，别把列车长当成小孩子帕！
t_en: Boohoo... No, it's just... Hang on, Don't think of Pom-Pom as a child, okay?

t_ch: {NICKNAME}乘客，你来得正好，帕姆有事想问你——如果让你给帕姆打分，平心而论…你会给帕姆几分？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, you're just in the nick of time. Pom-Pom wanted to ask you something — if you were to give me a rating, in all fairness... How would you rate me?

t_ch: 不用紧张，你就当、就当是列车服务之类的满意度调查好了。
t_en: Don't be nervous. Just think of it as a survey about the service record.

t_ch: 怎么样？你觉得帕姆能拿几分？
t_en: How about it? What would you score me?

t_ch: 当然是满分！
t_en: Full points, of course!

t_ch: 呜哇！我就知道{NICKNAME}乘客心里有我！
t_en: Wow! Pom-Pom knew {NICKNAME} had me on their mind!

t_ch: 能打负分吗？
t_en: Am I allowed to give you a negative?

t_ch: …{NICKNAME}乘客，欺负列车长你觉得有趣是吗？
t_en: ...{NICKNAME}, are you having fun bullying me like that?

t_ch: 请你摸着良心打分！
t_en: Please give me a kind rating!

t_ch: 感觉还行，六分起步吧…
t_en: You're pretty good. I'll give you six out of ten...

t_ch: 「还行」的话，为什么只有六分？
t_en: If Pom-Pom is "pretty good," why did you only give me a six out of ten?

t_ch: 态度不要这么敷衍帕！
t_en: Don't skimp out on me here!

t_ch: 呜…为什么要欺负帕姆…为什么要给帕姆一分，这毫无道理帕！不行不行！
t_en: Oh... Why are you bullying Pom-Pom? Why would you give Pom-Pom just one out of ten, and that doesn't make sense! No no no!

t_ch: 帕姆怎么可能只有一分呢，一定是哪里搞错了！
t_en: How can Pom-Pom only get one out of ten. There must be a mistake!

t_ch: 我也没给你打一分啊…
t_en: I didn't give you a score of one though...

t_ch: 不是说你！
t_en: Pom-Pom didn't mean you!

t_ch: 谁给你打一分我去揍谁！
t_en: Who rated you that? I'll whack 'em!

t_ch: 冷静一点，别冲动！
t_en: Calm down. Please don't be so rash!

t_ch: 乖，告诉{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}到底发生什么了。
t_en: Be a good kid and tell me what happened.

t_ch: 再说一遍，请不要把列车长当作小孩子！
t_en: Again, please don't treat Pom-Pom like a child!

t_ch: 其实是这样的…唔，这是你上车之前的事了，有一次列车停靠在空间站里——
t_en: Actually, it's like this... Well, this was before you got on the Express. Once, the Express stopped at the space station...

t_ch: 当时三月七乘客借了一个「奇物」过来玩，好像叫什么…「打分枪」？哦不对，帕姆想起来了，是叫「定分枪」！
t_en: March 7th was borrowing a Curio to play around. Pom-Pom thinks it was called... a Scoring Pistol? No, let Pom-Pom think... it was called a Rating Pistol.

t_ch: 这东西能给一切物体打分，就连帕姆也不例外！三月七乘客对着帕姆用了定分枪，但帕姆一直不知道自己是多少分。
t_en: This thing rates everything, even me! March 7th used the pistol on Pom-Pom, but I never found out what rating I got.

t_ch: 前几天我想起这件事，就去问了一下…结果…结果说…只给帕姆打了一分！
t_en: When I remembered this a few days back, I went to ask... But they said... They said I only got one point!

t_ch: 呜哇！呜呜…帕姆…帕姆不能接受…怎么回事嘛！为什么帕姆只有一分！
t_en: Wow, Boohoo... Pom... Pom-Pom can't take it... How can this be! Why did I only get one point?

t_ch: （说点好听的，安慰帕姆）
t_en: (Say something nice to console Pom-Pom)

t_ch: 谢谢你，{NICKNAME}乘客…没想到{NICKNAME}乘客这么温柔。
t_en: Thank you, {NICKNAME}... Pom-Pom never knew you could be so kind.

t_ch: （拍拍帕姆的头，安抚帕姆）
t_en: (Pat Pom-Pom on the shoulder and comfort them)

t_ch: 停停停，列车长的头可不能乱摸！
t_en: Stop, stop, stop, you can't touch Pom-Pom's head like that!

t_ch: （冷静分析，劝帕姆不要在意）
t_en: (Analyze it calmly and ask Pom-Pom not to care about it)

t_ch: 嗯，你说得在理！
t_en: Mmm, yes, that's reasonable!

t_ch: 你成功地令帕姆停止了哭泣。
t_en: You manage to stop Pom-Pom from crying.

t_ch: 谢谢你，{NICKNAME}乘客。
t_en: Thank you, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 帕姆…帕姆只是一时没想明白，现在帕姆感觉好多了。
t_en: Pom-Pom... was just at a loss there, but Pom-Pom's feeling better now.

t_ch: 对了…那个，{NICKNAME}乘客以后可不可以多回来列车…才不是想你了。
t_en: Oh right, {NICKNAME}, could you come back to the Express often... It's not that Pom-Pom missed you.

t_ch: 只是有点担心你的危险，所以、所以记得定期回来跟列车长报平安哦！
t_en: Pom-Pom's just a little worried about your safety, s—so remember to come back often and check in with your favorite conductor, okay?
Mm? *sigh*

t_ch: 哎…哎…哎……
t_en: *sigh* *sigh* *sigh*

t_ch: 干吗一直复读…
t_en: Why are you repeating this?

t_ch: 帕姆才不是复读机！
t_en: Pom-Pom's not a repeater!

t_ch: 怎么一直叹气？
t_en: Why do you keep sighing?

t_ch: 哎，帕姆有点难受……
t_en: *sigh* Pom-Pom's just feeling a little sick...

t_ch: 帕姆在找东西，但是没找到，好烦哇！
t_en: Pom-Pom's looking for something, but Pom-Pom can't find it. What a hassle!

t_ch: 灯光也调过了…音乐也放过了…都没有用！好烦帕，好想休息休息，但是怎么也睡不着。
t_en: Pom-Pom's turned down the house lights... and played music... But that doesn't work! Pom-Pom just can't get to sleep.

t_ch: 对了，正好{NICKNAME}乘客在，对于失眠，你有什么办法吗？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, have you got anything for insomnia?

t_ch: 我给你唱个摇篮曲吧！
t_en: I can sing you a lullaby!

t_ch: 这种事还是让三月乘客来吧。等等，帕姆又不是小孩子，才不需要什么摇篮曲！
t_en: Pom-Pom thinks March 7th is better when it comes to that. Hang on. Pom-Pom's not a kid, so Pom-Pom doesn't need any lullaby!

t_ch: 我给你讲个睡前故事？
t_en: Shall I tell you a bedtime story?

t_ch: 唔，听起来好像不错。
t_en: Ooh, that sounds good.

t_ch: 去做点别的，消耗下体力？
t_en: Go do something else and burn up some energy?

t_ch: 哎，我早就试过了，没什么用……
t_en: Ugh, Pom-Pom tried but it's no use...

t_ch: 对了，帕姆想起一件事，瓦尔特乘客在讲他创作的动画故事的时候，帕姆总是不小心睡着。
t_en: Oh yeah, Pom-Pom thought of something: Whenever Welt was telling me about the animated story he made, Pom-Pom always fell asleep quick.

t_ch: 虽然不确定这么做有没有用，但{NICKNAME}乘客既然在…能不能帮帮帕姆哇！
t_en: Pom-Pom's not sure whether this'll work or not, but since you're here... Can you help Pom-Pom out?

t_ch: 可不可以给帕姆讲个睡前故事？{NICKNAME}乘客成天在外冒险，想来一路上有不少故事吧。
t_en: Can you tell Pom-Pom a bedtime story then, {NICKNAME}? You're always off adventuring. Pom-Pom's sure you've come across many stories during your journeys.

t_ch: （现编一段童话故事）
t_en: (Ad-lib a fairy tale)

t_ch: 嗯，一位王子，他其实是巨龙变成的？听起来有点奇怪…算了，你继续吧。
t_en: Okay, a prince who's transformed from a dragon... It sounds kinda weird... whatever, go on.

t_ch: 他很穷，好像越来越不对劲了…然后呢？翻了个垃圾桶就得到了藏宝图？
t_en: He's really poor, and then things get weirder and weirder... And then? He found a treasure map in the trashcan?

t_ch: 然后就…然后…唔……
t_en: And then... Um... Then...

t_ch: （给帕姆讲段冒险经历）
t_en: (Tell Pom-Pom about a brief adventure of yours)

t_ch: 呜哇！好惊险，还好你们当时没出事！
t_en: Wow! So thrilling. You guys are lucky not to get hurt!

t_ch: 所以那些裂界怪物挺吓人…对吧……
t_en: So those Fragmentum beasts are scary, right...

t_ch: 呜呜…还好…空间站怎么也有…呜…然后…然后……
t_en: *sob* Okay... How come the space station has... Um... Then... And then...

t_ch: （讲述旅途中的趣事）
t_en: (Tell a funny story about your journey)

t_ch: 哈哈！三月七乘客总是这样，帕姆都见怪不怪啦！咳咳，这句话别告诉她，记得帕！
t_en: Haha! That's so March 7th. Pom-Pom's not surprised! Ahem, don't tell her about this — remember that!

t_ch: 所以她找到了对吧，还好，帕姆知道大家都是好孩子……
t_en: So she found it, right? Luckily Pom-Pom knows that everyone is a good person...

t_ch: 有多好…就是…好……
t_en: Good... is just good...

t_ch: （转述小说中的故事）
t_en: (Paraphrasing a story from a novel)

t_ch: 嗯嗯，这个故事好像有点耳熟，真的是发生在空间站的真事吗？
t_en: Mmm-hmm, this story seems familiar somehow. Did it really happen on the space station?

t_ch: …应物科？好像听过。等等，刚刚说的是应物科还是天才俱乐部来着？
t_en: ...The Department of Implement Arts? Pom-Pom's heard of it. Hang on, did you just say the Department of Implement Arts or the Genius Society?

t_ch: 知道啦…应物…密卷…地什么来着…地…地…想不起来了……
t_en: Pom-Pom knows... Implement Arts... Mysticism... Geo... What is it... Pom-Pom can't remember...

t_ch: 伴随着你讲故事的声音，帕姆不知不觉睡着了。
t_en: Thanks to your storytelling voice, Pom-Pom gradually drifts off to sleep.

t_ch: …我刚刚睡着了吗？
t_en: ...Did Pom-Pom just fall asleep?

t_ch: 呜哇！{NICKNAME}乘客真厉害，声音竟然这么催眠！
t_en: Wow! {NICKNAME}, you're amazing. Your voice is like hypnosis!

t_ch: 谢谢你，乘客。这件事不要说出去帕，倒不是怕丢人，只是不想让其他乘客担心列车长。
t_en: Thank you, dear passenger. Please don't tell anyone about this. Pom-Pom's not embarrassed, Pom-Pom just doesn't want other people to worry unduly about me.

t_ch: 要记得哦，不能对说出去！
t_en: Remember, don't tell anyone!

t_ch: 糟糕了，糟糕了…要是再找不到纽扣的话，就会被乘客看到如此失态的样子了……
t_en: Darn it, darn it... If Pom-Pom can't find the button soon, Pom-Pom'll look all disheveled in front of the passengers...

t_ch: 已经看到了。
t_en: Too late. I already saw you.

t_ch: 啊！！！！{NICKNAME}乘客，你突然出现，吓了帕姆一大跳！
t_en: Argh!! {NICKNAME}, where'd you come from? You freaked Pom-Pom out!

t_ch: 我帮你找找吧？
t_en: Want a hand looking for that?

t_ch: 啊！！！！{NICKNAME}乘客，你突然出现，吓了帕姆一大跳！
t_en: Argh!! {NICKNAME}, where'd you come from? You freaked Pom-Pom out!

t_ch: 我的衣服纽扣不知道什么时候丢了…明明上次有认真缝好的！现在衣服就豁开了个大口子，太丢人了……
t_en: Pom-Pom's not sure where, but my button's fallen off somewhere... Pom-Pom did sew it on my uniform last time. But now my clothes have this big open gap, and it's simply embarrassing...

t_ch: 得赶在其他乘客看到列车长如此失态模样之前，找到纽扣才行！拜托你了{NICKNAME}乘客！
t_en: Pom-Pom has to find that button before any other passengers see me like this! Please, {NICKNAME}, help Pom-Pom find it!

t_ch: 难道是因为帕姆最近吃得有点多，长胖了把纽扣崩掉了么…不可能！绝对不可能！帕姆只吃了一点点而已嘛！
t_en: Could it be that Pom-Pom's been eating a little too much these days, and the button's popped off my fat belly... No way! Absolutely no way! Pom-Pom only ate a little.

t_ch: （把纽扣交给帕姆）
t_en: (Give Pom-Pom the button)

t_ch: 太好啦，这就是帕姆的纽扣！接下来只需要拿出针线缝缝补补…锵锵！大功告成！
t_en: Oh, it's my button! Now Pom-Pom just needs a needle and thread to stitch it all up... Dum-dee-do! All done!

t_ch: 唔…感觉呼吸有点困难是怎么回事？衣服变得有点紧……
t_en: Oh... Pom-Pom feels like it's getting harder to breathe. How did Pom-Pom's clothes just get tighter...

t_ch: 你发现了一枚圆圆的小东西，凑近一看…是瓶盖，不是纽扣！
t_en: You discover a round thing and draw closer to inspect... It's a bottle cap, not a button!

t_ch: （应该是制作饮料的时候掉下来的，扔进垃圾桶吧！）
t_en: (This must have fallen down while getting a drink. So throw it in the trash!)

t_ch: 你发现了一枚方正的小东西，凑近一看…是贴纸，不是纽扣！
t_en: You discover a square thing and draw closer to inspect... It's a note, not a button!

t_ch: （像是三月七落下的东西…也可能是故意贴在这里做装饰的？）
t_en: (Looks like something March 7th left behind... Perhaps she deliberately stuck it there as a decoration?)

t_ch: 你发现了一枚闪闪发光的小东西，凑近一看…是帕姆衣服上的纽扣！
t_en: You discover a sparkly thing and draw closer to inspect... It's Pom-Pom's button!

t_ch: （赶紧把纽扣交给帕姆吧！）
t_en: (Take the button back to Pom-Pom ASAP!)

t_ch: 每次听到这首歌，帕姆心中就会浮现出一种怪怪的感觉…就像是在宇宙中漫无目的地漂浮一样，而且还有点难过……
t_en: Every time Pom-Pom hears this song, Pom-Pom gets a weird sensation... Pom-Pom feels like floating about aimlessly in the universe, and a little sad...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}乘客，你会有这样的感觉吗？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, do you ever feel like this?

t_ch: 我不以歌喜不以曲悲。
t_en: I'm not a sentimental type.

t_ch: 想不到{NICKNAME}乘客是那种意志坚定的人呢。
t_en: Pom-Pom never thought you were such a staunch and stubborn person.

t_ch: 我是多愁善感的类型。
t_en: I get sentimental easily.

t_ch: 想不到{NICKNAME}乘客也是这么感性的人呢！
t_en: Pom-Pom never thought you were such a sensitive person!

t_ch: 哎，这样无名的情感一直在帕姆的胸口涤荡，帕姆越来越难过，甚至有点提不起劲了……
t_en: *sigh* This nameless emotion has been building up in my chest, and Pom-Pom just feels sadder and sadder. Sometimes it even makes me feel tired...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}乘客，我该怎么做才能摆脱这种怪异的情绪呢？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, what can Pom-Pom do to get rid of this weird feeling?

t_ch: 别听了不就行了。
t_en: Just ignore it.

t_ch: 即便耳朵里没有声音，那种情绪也挥之不去的！
t_en: Even if there's dead silence, the voices don't go away!

t_ch: 换首歌听听呗。
t_en: Listen to something else.

t_ch: 没有办法的，帕姆的耳朵里、脑海里，已经都是那个声音的样子了！
t_en: There's nothing Pom-Pom can do. My mind and ears are just full of that song!

t_ch: 总之，拜托{NICKNAME}乘客想想办法吧！帕姆目前能够拜托的也只有你了…
t_en: In any case, please help Pom-Pom think up a fix for this, {NICKNAME}! You're my only salvation...

t_ch: 靠近桌子边缘的位置放着一个小小的陶瓷杯，你发现它有三分之一的底座悬于半空。也就是说，只要你稍稍一碰，它就会摔得粉身碎骨。
t_en: There's a small ceramic mug near the edge of the table, and you discover nearly a third of its base extended over the edge. That is to say, if you were to give it the gentlest of nudges, it would smash to pieces.

t_ch: 如果摔碎了杯子的话…帕姆的表情一定会很精彩吧？
t_en: If a glass gets broken... Pom-Pom will certainly have a wonderful reaction to it, won't they?

t_ch: （打碎杯子）
t_en: (Smash it)

t_ch: 落地的声音非常清脆，你相信帕姆一定听到了这个声音…
t_en: The sound of the mug smashing on the floor was so crisp that you trust Pom-Pom must have heard it...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}乘客！你怎么这么不小心！把杯子都打碎了！真是的，帕姆又得去打扫……
t_en: {NICKNAME}, how can you be so careless! You smashed that mug! Really, now Pom-Pom has to get out my broom again...

t_ch: 下次可不能这么不小心了哦！陶瓷碎片可是很危险的，稍不留心就会割破手指。
t_en: Don't be so careless again! Ceramic shards are dangerous, and someone could cut themselves.

t_ch: 这就是我想的办法。
t_en: This is what I came up with.

t_ch: 看样子你从悲伤中走出来了。
t_en: Seems like you're no longer depressed.

t_ch: …唔，这就是{NICKNAME}乘客想的办法？好像确实挺有用的……
t_en: ...Oh, so that was your plan all along? It seems like it kinda worked...

t_ch: 但是！成本太高了！下次不许这么做了哦！呜呜…帕姆的杯子。
t_en: But! The cost was too high! Next time, please don't do this! Boohoo... That was my mug.

t_ch: （还是算了吧）
t_en: (Forget it)

t_ch: （还是再想想别的方法吧）
t_en: (Think of another way)

t_ch: 帕姆每天都会认真打扫这里的坐垫，稍微落下一点灰尘都会快速清理干净。
t_en: Pom-Pom carefully cleans the cushions here every day, and a little dust will quickly be swept away.

t_ch: 如果不脱鞋子就躺上去…帕姆的表情一定会很精彩吧？
t_en: Lying down with the slippers on will surely make Pom-Pom all worked up, right?

t_ch: （躺上去）
t_en: (Lie down)

t_ch: 你还没来得及把双腿放到坐垫上，帕姆就快速冲了过来……
t_en: Before you even have the time to place both feet upon the cushion, Pom-Pom charges over...

t_ch: 停停停！你在做什么！怎么可以穿着鞋子躺在这里呢！帕姆每天打扫起来可是很辛苦的！
t_en: Stop, stop, stop! How can you lie down here with your slippers on like that!? Pom-Pom breaks their back cleaning up around here every day!

t_ch: 真是不让帕姆省心，稍微不留意一会儿就能做出这么危险的行为。
t_en: Pom-Pom just can't let their guard down, can they? Whenever Pom-Pom isn't paying attention, a calamity is about to happen.

t_ch: 这就是我想的办法。
t_en: This is what I came up with.

t_ch: 看样子你从悲伤中走出来了。
t_en: Seems like you're no longer depressed.

t_ch: …唔，这就是{NICKNAME}乘客想的办法？好像确实挺有用的……
t_en: ...Oh, so that was your plan all along? It seems like it kinda worked...

t_ch: 但是！下次不可以这样做了哦！呜呜…这可是很用心在保养的坐垫。
t_en: But! Next time, please don't do this! Boohoo... This is Pom-Pom's most cherished cushion.

t_ch: （还是算了吧）
t_en: (Forget it)

t_ch: （还是再想想别的方法吧）
t_en: (Think of another way)

t_ch: 这是帕姆最宝贝的绿植，哪怕叶片的颜色稍微黯淡一些，它都能快速察觉。
t_en: This is Pom-Pom's most prized plant. They'll notice even if one leaf is ever-so-slightly darker.

t_ch: 如果你摘下一枚叶片的话…帕姆的表情一定会很精彩吧？
t_en: If you plucked off a leaf... Pom-Pom would perk up a bit, right?

t_ch: （摘叶子）
t_en: (Pluck a leaf)

t_ch: 你还没来得及碰到叶片，帕姆就快速冲了过来……
t_en: Before you even have the time to touch a leaf, Pom-Pom charges over...

t_ch: 停停停！你在做什么！这可是帕姆精心照料的绿植！随便乱摸可是会影响它成长的！
t_en: Stop, stop, stop! What are you doing!? This is the plant which Pom-Pom carefully tends! Touching it like that will impede its growth!

t_ch: 真是不让帕姆省心，稍微不留意一会儿就能做出这么危险的行为。
t_en: Pom-Pom just can't let their guard down, can they? Whenever Pom-Pom isn't paying attention, a calamity is about to happen.

t_ch: 这就是我想的办法。
t_en: This is what I came up with.

t_ch: 看样子你从悲伤中走出来了。
t_en: Seems like you're no longer depressed.

t_ch: …唔，这就是{NICKNAME}乘客想的办法？好像确实挺有用的……
t_en: ...Oh, so that was your plan all along? It seems like it kinda worked...

t_ch: 但是！下次不可以这样做了哦！呼…吓死帕姆了！幸好没有影响到绿植……
t_en: But! Next time, don't do that! Woo... You really freaked me out! Luckily my plant is alright...

t_ch: （还是算了吧）
t_en: (Forget it)

t_ch: （还是再想想别的方法吧）
t_en: (Think of another way)

t_ch: {NICKNAME}乘客，怎么啦？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, what's wrong?

t_ch: 车厢里一直都是这么「风平浪静」，你是不是还有点不习惯？
t_en: The coach has always been so peaceful and quiet. Are you not used to it?

t_ch: 感觉有点无聊。
t_en: It's pretty boring.

t_ch: 三月七乘客之前也是这么说的。
t_en: March 7th also said the same thing.

t_ch: 还好，我随便逛逛就好…
t_en: It's okay. I can just go for a stroll if I want...

t_ch: 「逛逛」？你想「逛」什么，不如直接问我帕！
t_en: "A stroll"? Why stroll around when you can just ask me anything!

t_ch: 你要是无所事事，可以去车窗边看看，那里的景色挺不错的。
t_en: If you've got nothing to do, you can go look outside the window. The view is spectacular.

t_ch: 帕姆和三月七乘客都喜欢待在窗边看星星，有时候还会看到难得一见的奇景。
t_en: Both March 7th and I love sitting in the window seats and staring out the window at the stars. Sometimes we even get to see some rare wonders.

t_ch: 车窗外的风景虽美，但看久了似乎也没什么特别之处。
t_en: Despite the view being spectacular outside, it doesn't seem so special once you've been looking for as long as you have.

t_ch: 平淡的意义
t_en: Plain meaning

t_ch: 列车长没骗你吧，是不是很有意思？
t_en: I wasn't kidding, was I? Isn't it interesting?

t_ch: 看完了，就这？
t_en: I'm done. That's it?

t_ch: 「就这」？这可是只有在星穹列车上才能看到的景色！
t_en: "That's it"? This rare vista can only be admired from aboard the Astral Express!

t_ch: 还行，但没什么特别的。
t_en: It's alright, but nothing special.

t_ch: …你怎么一副嫌弃的样子。
t_en: ...Don't be a hater.

t_ch: 还不错，要是没车窗就更好了…
t_en: Not bad, but it'd be even better if there weren't any windows...

t_ch: 没有车窗吗…但那样就不安全了帕！
t_en: No windows... But that wouldn't be safe!

t_ch: 算啦，「无名客」要是不向往外面的世界，那就不叫「无名客」了。
t_en: Forget it. If the Nameless didn't long for the outside world, then they wouldn't be called the Nameless.

t_ch: 维持列车上平静而有序的生活，是列车长的职责——等你以后在外冒险久了，你就会明白这种难得的平静有多珍贵了。
t_en: It's the duty of the conductor to maintain a peaceful and orderly atmosphere aboard the Express. Once you go outside on your adventures again, you'll understand how precious and rare a commodity peace is.

t_ch: 下一步是…加入胡萝卜？还是加入莓果？呜…难道前一步就搞错了？
t_en: The next step is... Adding the carrots? Or adding berries? Huh... Did I make a mistake on that last step?

t_ch: 是加入胡萝卜。
t_en: Add the carrots.

t_ch: 可是「莓莓果汁」里不太像是会加入胡萝卜的样子呀？总感觉怪怪的……
t_en: But I don't think carrots are meant to go into Berry Juice. Do you? It feels weird...

t_ch: 是加入蓝莓。
t_en: Add the blueberries.

t_ch: 但是上一步帕姆就已经加入过蓝莓了。「莓莓果汁」的做法到底是什么呢……
t_en: But I already added the blueberries during the last step. How on earth do you make this Berry Juice...

t_ch: 哎，还是看看三月乘客留给帕姆的「莓莓果汁」配方表吧！
t_en: Hey, let's check out the Berry Juice recipe that March 7th made for me!

t_ch: 配方表放到哪里了？怎么帕姆连这个也忘记了！
t_en: Where did I put it? How can I even forget something as basic as this!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}乘客，你可以帮我找找配方放到哪里了吗？帕姆好像不记得了。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, can you help me find where I put my recipe? I forgot where I left it.

t_ch: 你发现一张皱巴巴的纸片，先前应该是被人用力揉成了纸团。
t_en: You find a wrinkled up piece of paper, which must've been crunched up into a paper ball before.

t_ch: 「今天不努力，明天做苦力；今天不拼命，明天喝空气！」
t_en: "If you don't work hard today, you'll have more hard work tomorrow. If you don't try your hardest today, you'll have nothing left tomorrow!"

t_ch: （应该是某位乘客带上来的，不是「莓莓果汁」的配方。再在附近找找吧！）
t_en: (This isn't the Berry Juice recipe but probably something left behind by another passenger. Keep looking nearby!)

t_ch: 一张小纸片被夹在缝隙中，你小心翼翼将它取出来。
t_en: There's a small piece of paper stuck in the crack, and you carefully fish it out.

t_ch: 「备忘：买牙膏」
t_en: "Reminders: Buy toothpaste"

t_ch: （这不是「莓莓果汁」的配方，再在附近找找吧！）
t_en: (This isn't the Berry Juice recipe. Keep looking nearby!)

t_ch: 一张纸页被放在桌面上，上面似乎被某种橙红色的液体打湿过。
t_en: There's a sheet of paper on the table which seems to have had some kind of orange liquid spilled on it.

t_ch: 「没莓果汁配方：胡萝卜两根、黄瓜半根、雪梨两个。放入榨汁机即可。」
t_en: "No-Berry Juice Recipe: Two carrots; half a cucumber; two pears. Place inside a juicer and blend."

t_ch: （看来帕姆记错了果汁的名字，怪不得也想不起来原材料是什么了。）
t_en: (Looks like Pom-Pom completely bungled the name of this juice. No wonder they forgot what the ingredients were.)

t_ch: 难道已经到了会忘记事情的年纪了吗？帕姆明明还很年轻的……
t_en: Am I starting to get old and senile? But Pom-Pom is clearly still young...

t_ch: （将没莓果汁配方交给帕姆）
t_en: (Hand over the No-Berry Juice recipe to Pom-Pom)

t_ch: 没…没莓果汁？哦！帕姆想起来了！这是三月乘客专门为不爱莓果的乘客制作的特定饮料配方！
t_en: N...NO-Berry Juice!? Oh, Pom-Pom remembers now! This is a special recipe crafted by March 7th, especially for passengers who don't like berries!

t_ch: 那就应该使用胡萝卜，而不是使用蓝莓！帕姆记起来了，下次也不会忘了。
t_en: Then let's add the carrots, and not the blueberries! Pom-Pom remembers now, and won't forget next time.

t_ch: 还…还差一点就能测到了…哎！又失败了！呜，自己测量自己的身体数据果然无法完成帕！
t_en: ...Almost ready to measure it... Oh no! Failed again! Hoo boy, it sure is hard to measure accurate data about yourself!

t_ch: 你在做什么？
t_en: What are you doing?

t_ch: 我在测量自己的身高，可是怎么测都测不准，每次的数据都不一样……
t_en: Pom-Pom's trying the measure their height, but Pom-Pom can't get an accurate reading. Every time it's a different number...

t_ch: 需要我帮你吗？
t_en: Do you need a hand?

t_ch: 太好了！那就麻烦{NICKNAME}乘客啦，不会耽误你太长时间的！
t_en: Great! Yes please, {NICKNAME}, Pom-Pom won't take up too much of your time!

t_ch: 三月乘客说打算给帕姆做一些新衣服，所以我打算自己测量一下身高，方便三月乘客裁剪布料！
t_en: March 7th said she was going to stitch some new clothes for me, so I wanted to measure my height to help her cut some cloth!

t_ch: 嘿嘿，不知道会是什么样的衣服呢？好期待哦——
t_en: Teehee, Pom-Pom wonders what clothes they'll be? Can't wait —

t_ch: 如果{NICKNAME}乘客准备好了的话，就来替我测量帕！一定要贴在墙壁上才能测得准哦！
t_en: If you're ready, {NICKNAME}, come and measure Pom-Pom! Stick it on the wall and get an accurate reading, please!

t_ch: 帕姆已经站好了！{NICKNAME}乘客如实记录数据就行，不需要顾及列车长的颜面，给我虚增几厘米什么的……
t_en: I'm on my feet and ready! Just record the data truthfully, {NICKNAME} — you don't need to take into account my ego or think about adding a few inches of slack on...

t_ch: （如实测量记录数据）
t_en: (Truthfully measure and record the data)

t_ch: 让帕姆看看…哎，居然身高和上一次比一点都没变！是不是应该多增加蛋白质摄入了……
t_en: Let Pom-Pom see... Whoa, my height hasn't changed at all since last time! Maybe I should increase my protein intake...

t_ch: （稍微少记录几厘米）
t_en: (Slightly take off a couple of centimeters)

t_ch: 让帕姆看看…诶？！竟然还矮了这么多？有问题，绝对有问题！帕姆不相信！
t_en: Let Pom-Pom see... Huh!? Pom-Pom is actually shorter now? Something's wrong. Something's definitely wrong! Pom-Pom doesn't believe it!

t_ch: （稍微多增加几厘米）
t_en: (Slightly add a couple of extra centimeters)

t_ch: 让帕姆看看…哇！居然真的有增加，明明之前都没有变过！简直难以置信！
t_en: Let Pom-Pom see... Wowsers! Pom-Pom is taller now, and there's a definite change from last time! That's incredible!

t_ch: 姑且就先将这个数据记下来吧！说不定三月乘客开始裁剪布料的时候，帕姆又长高了呢？
t_en: Let's pencil in this data for now! Perhaps by the time March 7th starts cutting her cloth, Pom-Pom will have grown a little more again?

t_ch: {NICKNAME}乘客，正好你回来了。
t_en: {NICKNAME}! You're back.

t_ch: 列车长有事要问你哦，是为了制定「列车行为准则」用的。
t_en: I've got something to ask you so that I can draft these "Express Regulations" that I'm doing.

t_ch: 尽管问就是了！
t_en: Ask away!

t_ch: 好哦！
t_en: Alright!

t_ch: 那是什么，你刚编的？
t_en: What's that? Did you just start drafting that now?

t_ch: 制定中，现在是意见收集阶段。
t_en: It's a work in progress that's currently in the consultation stage.

t_ch: 是关于「是否能携带宠物上车」一事的，有些乘客在旅行中会带上自己的宠物。
t_en: This one's about whether or not pets should be allowed on the Express. Sometimes passengers bring their pets with them on the Express.

t_ch: 但从我的专业知识与过往经验来判断，要在长途旅行中照料宠物，这可是件麻烦事。
t_en: But based on my professional expertise and previous experiences, taking care of pets during a long trip is a real hassle.

t_ch: 而且…有些乘客不太喜欢和动物相处，所以帕姆在想，要不要在「列车行为准则」中加一条——「禁止携带宠物上车」。
t_en: Besides... Some passengers don't really like animals, so Pom-Pom wonders whether it's worth adding a line in the Express Regulations — No Pets on Board?

t_ch: 这样不好吧，太死板了。
t_en: That's no good. It's too strict.

t_ch: 唔…好像是有点，帕姆再想想帕。
t_en: Oh... You're right. Pom-Pom will keep thinking on it.

t_ch: 如果对方说不是？
t_en: What if the passengers say they are not pets?

t_ch: 就是，乘客们平常养着的小动物呀？比如猫头鹰、猫和狗什么的。
t_en: Aren't pets easy to recognize? Such as small, common pets like an owl, a cat, or a dog.

t_ch: 等等…帕姆懂你意思了——有些人会把巨大的机器人当成宠物，还有些奇奇怪怪的生物！是帕姆想得不够周到。
t_en: Hang on... Pom-Pom gets what you mean — some people keep giant robots as pets, or even weird creatures! Pom-Pom wasn't thinking broadly enough about this.

t_ch: 其他人怎么说？
t_en: What do other people think?

t_ch: 在问啦在问啦，你别管别的乘客怎么想，说你的意见就好啦！
t_en: Pom-Pom is asking! Pom-Pom is asking! Don't worry about what other people think for now. Just state your own opinion!

t_ch: …不对，帕姆重新思索了下，就算帕姆设下了「禁止携带宠物上车」的行为准则。
t_en: ...No, Pom-Pom has thought long and hard on this, and even if Pom-Pom makes a No Pets on Board clause...

t_ch: 那万一…有的乘客说这不是「宠物」，而是自己的伙伴！遇到这种情况的话，「行为准则」就废掉了帕！
t_en: ...Then, what if... What if someone says that something isn't a "pet," but is instead their "companion"!? If this happened, the Express Regulations would be useless!

t_ch: 但是，就这么放着不管也不行，呜哇！怎么办帕！
t_en: But, Pom-Pom can't just leave things as they are. Waaah, what should Pom-Pom do?

t_ch: 这事急不来，还是再想想呗。
t_en: Don't rush things, Pom-Pom. Let's think it over again.

t_ch: 也是…反正也不急在一时。
t_en: Yeah... Anyway, there's no rush.

t_ch: 让乘客们提前申请啊。
t_en: Make passengers submit applications in advance.

t_ch: 好主意！提前准备上车申请的话，就能很轻易地判别，要带上车的究竟是什么物种，是否适合上车了！
t_en: Great idea! If we take applications in advance, then we can easily judge what species are allowed on the Express, and whether a pet is okay to board or not!

t_ch: 怎么办？凉拌！
t_en: What are we gonna do? Go and ask the crew!

t_ch: …{NICKNAME}乘客，能不能提点有建设性的意见！
t_en: ...{NICKNAME}, could you please give Pom-Pom some constructive feedback!

t_ch: 好了，意见先收集到这儿帕，不管怎么样，还是要谢谢{NICKNAME}乘客的配合！
t_en: Alright, that's enough opinion-gathering for now. Whatever happens, Pom-Pom has to thank you {NICKNAME} for your cooperation!

t_ch: 你回来啦！
t_en: You're back~

t_ch: 等一下！站住，先别动！
t_en: Hang on — stop there! Don't move!

t_ch: 干嘛？威胁我？
t_en: What are you doing? Is that a threat?

t_ch: 你的脑袋里成天在想些什么帕！
t_en: What's been going on in that head of yours all day, huh?

t_ch: 这么严肃是出什么事了？
t_en: Why so serious? Has something big happened?

t_ch: 没有没有，你不用担心，星穹列车上可是有列车长在照看呢！
t_en: No, there's nothing to worry about. It's just your friendly Astral Express conductor checking in on you!

t_ch: 不是什么要紧事，但在列车上要听列车长的话帕！
t_en: It's no big deal, but you have to listen to the conductor when you're on the Astral Express!

t_ch: 我最近在想，乘客们每次上车的时候，我应该注意检查下大家的个人情况。
t_en: Pom-Pom has been thinking that every time someone gets aboard the train, Pom-Pom should check in on their personal situation.

t_ch: 无论是身体状况，还是行李什么的…需要检查有没有什么安全隐患，以及有什么需要帮忙的地方。
t_en: Whether it's their health, their luggage, or... if there's any potential hazards that need checking, or if there's any way Pom-Pom can help...

t_ch: 这样才是合格的列车长帕！好啦，你先站着别动，让我检查下你的状况——
t_en: That's what a professional conductor should do! Alright, just stand still and let Pom-Pom give you a check —

t_ch: 要打开行李给你检查吗？
t_en: Do you want to check inside my luggage?

t_ch: 那倒不用。
t_en: Not really.

t_ch: 怎么检查，用鼻子嗅吗？
t_en: How do you check things? Some kind of sniff test?

t_ch: …{NICKNAME}乘客脑袋里就不能想点正常的事情吗？
t_en: ...{NICKNAME}, can you think of something normal for a change, please?

t_ch: 一切正常。
t_en: Everything's normal.

t_ch: 话虽如此，帕姆还是有点不放心大家。
t_en: That may be the case, but Pom-Pom is a little bit worried about everyone else.

t_ch: 嗯，身上有些挂彩，在外面吃了不少苦头吧？要准备医疗用品……
t_en: Mmm, you've been in the wars, haven't you? You're covered in scars. Let me get some medicine...

t_ch: 看你风尘仆仆的样子，估计肚子也饿了，餐车上的食物也得补货了。
t_en: Judging by your travel-worn appearance, you must be hungry. The food truck also needs restocking.

t_ch: 走进来又是一地灰尘，晚点得打扫一遍。
t_en: When Pom-Pom walked in, it was covered in dust. Pom-Pom will clean it again later.

t_ch: 好啦就这样了，谢谢{NICKNAME}乘客的配合！
t_en: Alright, that's it then. Thank you, {NICKNAME}, for your cooperation!

t_ch: 怎么回事呢？
t_en: What's up?

t_ch: 明明每天都有在认真浇水，怎么还是变成现在这个样子了呢？
t_en: Pom-Pom keeps on watering these plants, day in day out... So how can they be like this?

t_ch: 按照养殖手册的说法…这几天就应该开花了，但是现在叶片上长了点斑点，明显不太对劲。难道是发生了异变吗？
t_en: According to the propagation manual... They should have bloomed within the past few days, but instead, the leaves are all spotty. Something's obviously going on. Are they starting to mutate?

t_ch: 全新品类也不错。
t_en: Your own all-new species is pretty cool, no?

t_ch: 诶！你是这样想的吗？不过智库里确实有记载，很多全新的物种都是经过基因变异而产生的。
t_en: Hey! You really think so? The data bank has lots of records in it actually about how brand-new species come about through this kind of genetic mutation.

t_ch: 嘿嘿，难道我也要发现一种全新的植物了吗？嗯…叫什么名字好呢……
t_en: Heehee, don't tell me I'm about to invent an all-new species of plant, too? Mmm... What should I call it...

t_ch: 叫它「姆帕植株」！
t_en: Call it "The Mop-Mop Plant"!

t_ch: 为什么和帕姆的名字这么像啦！
t_en: Why does that sound so familiar to me!

t_ch: …不过仔细想想，确实也是我培育出来的，叫这个名字也好像很合适？
t_en: ...If you could think about it though, if I cultivated it, then perhaps it might be appropriate to name it after myself?

t_ch: 叫它「开拓植株」！
t_en: Call it "The Trailblaze Plant"!

t_ch: 总感觉和列车的属性太过重复了帕！
t_en: That's too similar to the function of this very Express!

t_ch: …不过仔细想想，确实是在列车上培育出来的，叫这个名字也好像很合适？
t_en: ...If you could think about it though, if it was cultivated on the Express, then perhaps it might be appropriate to name it after that?

t_ch: 异变感觉很危险…
t_en: Mutations can be dangerous...

t_ch: 果然会有这样的担心…老实说列车上确实不太建议培育这种未知品类的植物，除非有专人收容研究。
t_en: So you're afraid of that... To be honest, it really isn't the best to be propagating this kind of unknown species on the Express — unless we have a professional to help contain and study it.

t_ch: 但是目前列车上的乘客都有自己的事情要忙，没有人可以帮我处理它…难道要这样抛弃它了吗？
t_en: But right now all the passengers on the Express have their own business to attend to. Nobody can help me deal with this... Don't tell me I'll have to just throw it away?

t_ch: 再观望一下也不急？
t_en: Wait and see. There's no rush.

t_ch: 嗯…有道理有道理，毕竟也是一株生命，就这样轻易放弃还是太草率了！
t_en: Mmm... makes sense. After all, it's a living thing, so chucking it out would be pretty rash!

t_ch: 还是重新养一盆吧。
t_en: Why don't you get another?

t_ch: 嗯…说得对说得对，作为列车长，帕姆应该以列车和乘客的安危为第一优先级！
t_en: Mmmm... You're right. You're right. As conductor, Pom-Pom should be putting the safety of the Express and all its passengers first!

t_ch: 谢谢你帮我出主意，有空可以回来多关心关心列车上的植物哦～
t_en: Thank you for giving me those ideas. If you get the time, come back and check in on the plants here~

t_ch: 不知道大家都喜欢什么口味呢……
t_en: Pom-Pom wonders what flavor everyone likes...

t_ch: 正好{NICKNAME}乘客来了，那就配合一下，帮列车长提升列车的服务体验吧！
t_en: Now that {NICKNAME} is here, why don't you help Pom-Pom to improve the service of the Express!

t_ch: 首先是——餐车食物的口味！你喜欢什么口味的食物哇？
t_en: Firstly, let's focus on the food truck! What kind of food do you like?

t_ch: 我是甜口…
t_en: I have a sweet tooth...

t_ch: 噢噢，那我多安排一些甜点。
t_en: Well, I'll arrange for more desserts then.

t_ch: 我是咸口…
t_en: I prefer salty food...

t_ch: 火腿什么的看来可以安排上。
t_en: I think ham and sausages will be right up your alley.

t_ch: 我喜欢吃辣！
t_en: I like spicy food!

t_ch: …辣味，想不到你还蛮喜欢刺激的东西。
t_en: ...I'm surprised you are into spicy food.

t_ch: 都行，我没什么禁忌。
t_en: I'm fine with anything. I don't really have a preference.

t_ch: 好哦，你要是有什么想吃的记得跟列车长说哦。
t_en: Great! Please don't hesitate to tell me if there's anything you want to eat.

t_ch: 好的，都记下来啦！那饮料呢，帕姆记得三月七乘客总喜欢喝果汁，姬子喜欢咖啡。
t_en: I've written it all down! How about drinks? As far as I know, March 7th always has fruit juice, and Himeko loves coffee.

t_ch: 但光是果汁的话，就有很多种口味。你呢？你喜欢喝什么？
t_en: Still, fruit juice has a variety of flavors. How about you? What kind of beverage do you like?

t_ch: 还是喝果汁吧。
t_en: I think I'll stick with fruit juice.

t_ch: 行帕，和三月七乘客一样的话，那以后就准备双份。
t_en: Very well. Since it's the same as what March 7th wants, I'll prepare 2 glasses of fruit juice from now on.

t_ch: 我喝水就行了，够健康。
t_en: A glass of water will do. It's good for health.

t_ch: 好哦，感觉{NICKNAME}乘客的生活作息都很健康嘛。
t_en: Got it. It seems like you're leading a very healthy lifestyle, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 来点气泡水！
t_en: I'd like some sparkling water!

t_ch: 气泡水…目前没备货，等我记一下帕！
t_en: Sparkling water... is currently unavailable. I'll jot it down first!

t_ch: 还是喝茶好了。
t_en: I'll have some tea.

t_ch: 唔，高品质的茶叶有点难找，不过这难不倒列车长！
t_en: Um... High-quality tea is a rare find, but it shouldn't be much of a problem for me!

t_ch: 嗯嗯，都记下了。不过提前跟你说一声帕，这些东西虽然记录了，但不是马上就有帕。
t_en: I've taken note of everything, but it doesn't mean you all will get those things right away.

t_ch: 准备起来总是需要时间的，{NICKNAME}乘客不要太心急噢。
t_en: It takes time to prepare them. Please wait patiently, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 已经…没法回头了！再这样下去会发生什么…帕姆想都不敢想！
t_en: I can't... turn around now! I daren't imagine what will happen if things go on at this rate...

t_ch: 发生什么事了？
t_en: What happened?

t_ch: 帕姆已经尽力想要回头，但还是做不到…呜呜，我是没用的列车长，屈服于痛苦了！
t_en: I tried my best to turn around, but I failed... Boohoo, I'm a useless conductor who succumbs to my pain!

t_ch: 现在回头还来得及。
t_en: It's still not too late to turn around now.

t_ch: 就算来得及，但帕姆还是没有办法回头！实在是太痛了，呜呜…太痛了！
t_en: I can't do it even though there's time! It hurts too much! Oh... it's too painful!

t_ch: 一定是因为昨天睡姿问题导致的！落枕真是太痛了，脖子完全没有办法转动，更别提回头了！
t_en: I'm sure it's because of my sleeping posture last night! It's so uncomfortable to have a stiff neck. I can't even move my neck, let alone turn around!

t_ch: 不过没想到{NICKNAME}乘客这么关心帕姆，嘿嘿。看你那么着急的样子，我都有点不好意思了。
t_en: Still, Pom-Pom didn't expect you to be worried about me so much, {NICKNAME}. Pom-Pom feels kinda bad seeing you this anxious.

t_ch: 可惜列车上没有人知道如何治疗落枕，要是能咨询一下懂医疗的人就好了。比如…艾丝妲的空间站应该有专人负责吧？
t_en: It's a shame that no one on the Express knows how to treat a stiff neck. It would be great if we could consult someone with medical knowledge. Perhaps there are some medical staff at Asta's space station?

t_ch: 那不是她的空间站。
t_en: That's not Asta's space station.

t_ch: 代理站长也是站长！如果有代理列车长的话，帕姆也会认可那个家伙的。
t_en: An acting lead researcher is a lead researcher too! If there were acting conductors, I'd acknowledge them!

t_ch: 专人只负责正式科员。
t_en: The medical staff only provide their services to the researchers.

t_ch: 你们上次击败末日兽，拯救空间站于水火之中，多多少少也算是个空间站英雄吧？
t_en: You guys defeated the Doomsday Beast and rescued the space station. Shouldn't that make you some sort of heroes to the space station?

t_ch: 能够帮助帕姆的只有{NICKNAME}乘客了！拜托了！请去问问看空间站的医疗科人员吧！
t_en: {NICKNAME}, you're the only one who can help Pom-Pom! Please contact the Medical Department of the space station for Pom-Pom!

t_ch: 好累，怎么每天都有那么多科员要来医疗舱？这里又不是办事大厅！
t_en: I'm exhausted. Why are the researchers flocking to the medical cabin every day? This isn't the administration office!

t_ch: 瞧，又来一个。事先声明，如果是想找我开医院假单，免谈！上头最近管的可严，没这个机会！
t_en: See, there's another one. If you're here to get a fake medical certificate from me, you can see yourself out now! My boss's been watching me closely lately, and there's no room for me to do such things!

t_ch: （询问关于落枕的问题）
t_en: (Ask about stiff neck)

t_ch: 我看你像落枕啊…哎算了算了，反正也不是大事。你就回去热敷一下，吃点止痛药一下，或者按摩一下啥的，总之避免二次受累拉伤就行。
t_en: Sounds like you're suffering from a stiff neck... Well, it isn't a big deal. Just apply a warm compress on your neck, take some painkillers, or massage your neck. Anyway, just avoid straining or spraining the muscles again.

t_ch: 要是一直疼得慌，你再过来复诊吧。不过还是那句老话，这种小伤小病不可能给你开假单的。
t_en: Come back if the pain persists. Just so you know, I won't give you a medical certificate for a problem as minor as that.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}乘客，你终于回来了！帕姆痛得好难受哇！
t_en: {NICKNAME}, you're finally back! The pain is driving me crazy!

t_ch: （建议帕姆热敷）
t_en: (Suggest Pom-Pom that they use a warm compress)

t_ch: 诶？这样就可以缓解吗？帕姆还以为要吃药呢！
t_en: Eh? Is that enough to make the pain go away? I thought I would need some medications!

t_ch: （建议帕姆吃止痛药）
t_en: (Suggest Pom-Pom that they take some painkillers)

t_ch: 真…真的吗？可是帕吃药诶……诶……
t_en: R—Really? But I have a problem taking medicine... Hmm...

t_ch: （建议帕姆按摩）
t_en: (Suggest Pom-Pom that they massage their neck)

t_ch: 让我试试…呜呜，稍微按一下就好痛哦！
t_en: Pom-Pom's gonna try... Ouch, the slightest touch hurts so much!

t_ch: 总之辛苦{NICKNAME}乘客替帕姆询问医生了，之后的事情…就交给帕姆自己吧！希望可以早点康复帕……
t_en: Anyway, I really appreciate your help, {NICKNAME}. I'll take it from here! Hopefully, I'll recover soon...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}乘客，你…你不要过来啊！
t_en: {NICKNAME}, d—don't come near me!

t_ch: 没惹你吧，我怎么你了？
t_en: I didn't remember messing with you. What's your problem?

t_ch: 不是那个意思！请不要误会！
t_en: I didn't mean to sound rude. Please don't get me wrong!

t_ch: 这话说得有点伤人啊…
t_en: What you said just now was rather hurtful...

t_ch: 帕姆不是故意的，抱歉！
t_en: That wasn't my intention! I'm very sorry about that!

t_ch: 那个…我…哎，算了，你还是过来吧，帮我个忙。
t_en: Well... I... Fine, you might as well come over. I need your help.

t_ch: 你能不能伸把手，让我扶着你？
t_en: Can you give me your hand so that I can hold on to you?

t_ch: 呜哇…不对，能不能拉我一把？那个…帕姆腿麻了，动不了。
t_en: Urgh... Hold on. Can you pull me up? My... My legs have gone numb, and I can't move.

t_ch: 要不我蹲下来背你？
t_en: How about I carry you on my back?

t_ch: 「蹲」？那还是算了，不至于，哼哼。
t_en: Carry? Forget it. I don't think that's necessary, hmph.

t_ch: 哈哈哈哈哈哈哈！
t_en: Hahahahahahaha!

t_ch: 有什么好笑的！
t_en: What's so funny?

t_ch: {NICKNAME}乘客，别笑啦，赶紧来拉列车长一把！
t_en: Stop laughing, {NICKNAME}. Come and give me a hand!

t_ch: 没问题。
t_en: No problem.

t_ch: 还好有你在呢。
t_en: Luckily, you're here.

t_ch: 哎，是帕姆不好，一个不注意就…来，{NICKNAME}乘客，麻烦搭把手！
t_en: Alas, I can only blame myself for this mess. {NICKNAME}, please give me a hand!

t_ch: 你伸出双手拉了帕姆一把，虽然这让你不知为何联想起了拔萝卜这件事……
t_en: You stretch out both hands to pull Pom-Pom. It somehow reminds you of the action of pulling carrots...

t_ch: 在你的搀扶下，帕姆的双腿总算恢复了正常。
t_en: With your help, Pom-Pom can finally move their legs.

t_ch: 唔，谁能想到打个瞌睡都能把腿睡麻呢。
t_en: Who would have thought that the legs can go numb when sleeping?

t_ch: 你的睡姿也太「妖娆」了。
t_en: Your sleeping posture is too weird.

t_ch: 才没有，帕姆只是太累了，不小心站着睡着了。
t_en: That's not the case! I was too tired, so I dozed off while standing.

t_ch: 你站着打瞌睡，不麻才怪！
t_en: No wonder your legs were numb!

t_ch: 没办法，刚刚打扫完车厢，实在有点累，一个不留神就……
t_en: What could I do? I was tuckered out after cleaning up the coach. My mind drifted off without me realizing it...

t_ch: 谢谢{NICKNAME}乘客，不过你得答应我，这件事不许传出去。
t_en: Thanks, {NICKNAME}. Please promise me not to tell anyone about this.

t_ch: 不然帕姆会很生气的！要记住哦！
t_en: Or I'll flip out! Please bear that in mind!

t_ch: 啦啦啦～
t_en: La, la, la!

t_ch: 你也来啦？想听歌吗～过来一起听歌帕！
t_en: Hi there! Fancy some music? Let's listen to some songs together!

t_ch: 你刚刚在唱歌吗？
t_en: Were you singing just now?

t_ch: 随便哼哼而已。
t_en: I was just humming something off the top of my head.

t_ch: 你喜欢听什么歌？
t_en: What songs do you like?

t_ch: 帕姆什么都喜欢听。
t_en: Pom-Pom likes all kinds of songs.

t_ch: 啦啦啦～啦～啦啦啦～啦啦啦啦啦啦～
t_en: La, la, la! La... La, la, la! La, la, la, la, la, la~

t_ch: 帕姆自顾自地哼着歌，心情显然很不错，也显然不想理你。
t_en: Pom-Pom is absorbed in their own humming. They seem to be in a buoyant mood and show no interest in talking to you.

t_ch: （跟着帕姆一起唱）
t_en: (Sing along with Pom-Pom)

t_ch: 啦啦～啦～哒…哒哒哒？不对不对，唱错了。
t_en: La, la! La... Da... Da, da, da? Wait a minute. I've got it wrong.

t_ch: （把留声机关掉）
t_en: (Turn off the phonograph)

t_ch: 啦啦～啦～呃，怎么突然没声音了？
t_en: La, la... La... Eh? Why did the song stop?

t_ch: （强制帮帕姆切歌）
t_en: (Stop Pom-Pom from singing)

t_ch: 啦啦～啦～等等，怎么突然切歌了！
t_en: La, la... La... Hey! Why was the song cut off?

t_ch: …怎么回事？你在干吗？
t_en: ...What's going on? What are you doing?

t_ch: 你成功打断了帕姆的自娱自乐，但帕姆看起来似乎很生气。
t_en: You have successfully stopped Pom-Pom from singing, but they don't look happy about it.

t_ch: 后果是什么
t_en: What is the consequence?

t_ch: 呜哇！你到底想干什么哇！
t_en: Oh, no! What on earth are you planning to do?
